image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about antiviral windows than social media does.
Context visual: Antiviral windows refer to specific time frames when treatment is most effective.
Escalation visual: Timing matters! Miss the window, and the virus can spread unchecked.
Evidence visual: Studies show that early intervention can dramatically reduce severity.
Payoff visual: Understanding these windows can empower you to take action—don’t hesitate.
Cta visual: Want to stay informed? Like, share, and follow for more science insights!
